title: API key leads to 404 resource not found error
symptom: Using an API key in n8n results in a '404 resource not found' error when trying to access resources.
applies_when: Using an API key in n8n
The API key is incorrect or outdated
not_this_if: The API key is valid and correctly configured
root_cause: The error occurs because the API key being used is either incorrect or has been invalidated. This can happen if the key was part of a template installation or if it has been deleted or recreated without updating the references in n8n.
fix_steps: Delete the old API key from the n8n settings
Save the new API key securely
Update the n8n node with the new API key
agent_instruction: Delete the old API key and create a new one, then update the n8n node with the new key.
safety_notes: Using the new API key will stop any existing integrations that relied on the old key.
